name: Chocolate Chunk Peanut Butter Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with an electric mixer on high until frothy.
2. Add the sugar and peanut butter; mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the crushed butterfingers and evaporated milk, mixing until smooth.
4. Mix in the additional 3 cups of milk to achieve a creamy consistency.
5. Pour the mixture into a 5-quart ice cream freezer.
6. Freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
7. Allow the ice cream to ripen for at least 1 hour before serving.
Yield: about 1 gallon
